comments: “Well hello there, this is TV on the radio, Thomas Vance, the music vendor, welcome to the Friday Rock Show. A more than mammoth chunk of heft is in store for you tonight on our programme. We start the ‘United Kingdom Rock Concert Replay Season’ with two of the bands that really did blitz the Donington stage not that long ago. Both the live acts are from the United States of America, in the show tonight you will hear Cinderella and Anthrax…”

track_listing.details: LP-Hall Of The Mountain King; Atlantic
